captions.visual: The video begins with a standard ESRB rating warning screen on a black background. The text reads, 'MAY CONTAIN CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN,' with the ESRB logo and a link to their website below. This transitions to the white Rockstar Games 'R' logo appearing in the center of the screen.

captions.visual: A montage of scenes from a tropical town begins. An aerial shot shows a beautiful coastline with turquoise water, palm trees, and modern houses. The scene cuts to a low-angle shot of a weathered, green wooden house on stilts, with a vintage blue pickup truck parked in the gravel yard. A man in a Hawaiian shirt and sunglasses gets out of a modern silver pickup truck, looking around.

transcript_segments.text: What you doing up there? I'm just fixing some leaks. Seriously, dude, you got some time on your hands. I got some properties with paying tenants. That's why you came by? Just go get me my checks. See you, Brian. Love you, Jason. Hi, Jason. Hi, Jason.
I'm here for Lucia Caminos. She's supposed to be getting out. What's your name? Jason Duvall. I've seen you here before. You might have. Hey. Hey.

transcript_segments.text: Hands above your heads, now! You, stay! The new beginnings. You make the news, isn't it? Trust me, this place is just the start for us. Ring the bells! Shots, baby! The only thing that matters is who you know and what you got. If you're gonna do this, you're doing it right.
Yo, D, this full effect? They got your name, address, they got everything. Us cops, we gotta protect each other. You and me, girl. We got this. We got it. Say my city, baby. My city, baby.

She playfully jumps on his back to wake him up.
